title: QUAG SMP
description: This modpack is designed to enhance your Minecraft 26.2.1 QUAG SMP experience!
body:
### Welcome to the unofficial QUAG SMP Modpack for Minecraft! This pack is made to make  your server experience better with a mix of performance optimization, quality-of-life improvements, and visual upgrades, ensuring a smooth and enjoyable adventure for you.

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75a23afe884ad91c8ee7261e4fc2f040fe4c66a1.jpeg)

 **Features:**
Performance Boosts: Get a game with great performance mods like Sodium, Lithium, and MoreCulling.

 **QoL Enhancements:** Explore the world with ease using Xaero's Minimap & World Map, look trough your inventory better with ShulkerBoxTooltip, and talk to your friends with Simple Voice Chat.

**Visual Improvements:** Experience a more beautiful world with Iris Shaders, enhanced animations, and 3D skin layers.


<details>
<summary>Mods</summary>

**Included Mods:
This pack includes a lot of client-side mods to improve your game. Here is the little list:**

https://modrinth.com/modpack/quag/changelog
</details>




</details>

<details>
<summary>FAQ</summary>

Who is this modpack for?
This modpack is for all members of the QUAG SMP server. It's designed to create a standardized and cheat-free environment.

Why is it mandatory?
Using this pack ensures that:
✅ Everyone benefits from the same performance and QoL mods.
✅ Cheating and unfair advantages are prevented.
✅ The server remains stable and optimized for everyone.

Can I add or remove mods?
Yes!

How do I install the QUAG SMP Server Modpack?

Download the Modrinth App.

In the app, click the compas logo on the left

Search "QUAG" and then dowload!

Can I use shaders with this modpack?
Absolutely! The pack includes Iris Shaders and Resouricfy, allowing you to easily add and use your favorite shader packs.

Where can I report issues or suggest changes?
Please report any bugs or provide suggestions to Dylan.

Why can’t I use other mods or hacked clients?
Attempting to join with unapproved mods or clients is strictly against the rules and may result in a temporary or permanent ban from the server.

</details>
